title: Support the documentation of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural landscapes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Support the documentation of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural landscapes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Support the identification of cultural landscape characteristics on Country

pcs.text: Identify and record Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural landscapes and associated sites and features of cultural significance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural landscapes and associated sites and features of cultural significance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural landscapes and associated sites and features of cultural significance.

pcs.text: Investigate and record boundaries and extent of Country
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and record boundaries and extent of Country?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and record boundaries and extent of Country.

pcs.text: Relate the concept of lore/law and its connection to Country to supervisor and work colleagues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Relate the concept of lore/law and its connection to Country to supervisor and work colleagues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Relate the concept of lore/law and its connection to Country to supervisor and work colleagues.

pcs.text: Document Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural landscapes in ecological and anthropological and archaeological terms
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural landscapes in ecological and anthropological and archaeological terms?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural landscapes in ecological and anthropological and archaeological terms.

pcs.text: Document Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural landscapes in terms of cultural language and spirituality, and traditional economic terms
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural landscapes in terms of cultural language and spirituality, and traditional economic terms?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural landscapes in terms of cultural language and spirituality, and traditional economic terms.

pcs.text: Record anthropological and archaeological evidence of landforms according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record anthropological and archaeological evidence of landforms according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record anthropological and archaeological evidence of landforms according to supervisor instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Support the identification of cultural landscape characteristics on Country

elements.title: Participate in investigations of cultural and historical records of a cultural landscape

pcs.text: Research relevant databases, websites or the local Community for availability of historical records or prior research for the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research relevant databases, websites or the local Community for availability of historical records or prior research for the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research relevant databases, websites or the local Community for availability of historical records or prior research for the site.

pcs.text: Participate in research activities to document traditional understanding of the cycle of seasons and meteorological phenomena
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Participate in research activities to document traditional understanding of the cycle of seasons and meteorological phenomena?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Participate in research activities to document traditional understanding of the cycle of seasons and meteorological phenomena.

pcs.text: Record the research into landform and vegetation community types in a cultural landscape
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record the research into landform and vegetation community types in a cultural landscape?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record the research into landform and vegetation community types in a cultural landscape.

pcs.text: Record the determination of environmental cultural knowledge, cultural connections and relationships with the landscape that are passed down generationally
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record the determination of environmental cultural knowledge, cultural connections and relationships with the landscape that are passed down generationally?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record the determination of environmental cultural knowledge, cultural connections and relationships with the landscape that are passed down generationally.

pcs.text: Carry out investigations on Country in accordance with safe work policies and procedures, organisational requirements and Burra Charter guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out investigations on Country in accordance with safe work policies and procedures, organisational requirements and Burra Charter guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out investigations on Country in accordance with safe work policies and procedures, organisational requirements and Burra Charter guidelines.

pcs.text: Gather relevant cultural information according to requirements of Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Gather relevant cultural information according to requirements of Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Gather relevant cultural information according to requirements of Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP).

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Participate in investigations of cultural and historical records of a cultural landscape

elements.title: Document cultural practices and beliefs which maintain connections to cultural landscapes

pcs.text: Identify and consult with appropriate local cultural Knowledge Holders for a cultural landscape
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and consult with appropriate local cultural Knowledge Holders for a cultural landscape?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and consult with appropriate local cultural Knowledge Holders for a cultural landscape.

pcs.text: Ensure permissions have been sought relating to disclosure of knowledge and using anthropological and archaeological terminology and Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander terminology
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure permissions have been sought relating to disclosure of knowledge and using anthropological and archaeological terminology and Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander terminology?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure permissions have been sought relating to disclosure of knowledge and using anthropological and archaeological terminology and Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander terminology.

pcs.text: Document Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander beliefs and cultural and ceremonial practices that maintain connection with the cultural landscape according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander beliefs and cultural and ceremonial practices that maintain connection with the cultural landscape according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander beliefs and cultural and ceremonial practices that maintain connection with the cultural landscape according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Document the associations of connection to Country through language, stories, song, dance and art
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document the associations of connection to Country through language, stories, song, dance and art?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document the associations of connection to Country through language, stories, song, dance and art.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Document cultural practices and beliefs which maintain connections to cultural landscapes

elements.title: Identify cultural value links to cultural landscapes

pcs.text: Identify and record cultural landscapes and investigate links with Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural and Community knowledge
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record cultural landscapes and investigate links with Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural and Community knowledge?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record cultural landscapes and investigate links with Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural and Community knowledge.

pcs.text: Describe relationships between oral histories and kinship to the cultural landscape to supervisors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Describe relationships between oral histories and kinship to the cultural landscape to supervisors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Describe relationships between oral histories and kinship to the cultural landscape to supervisors.

pcs.text: Categorise links between archaeological and anthropological evidence and cultural landscapes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Categorise links between archaeological and anthropological evidence and cultural landscapes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Categorise links between archaeological and anthropological evidence and cultural landscapes.

pcs.text: Identify and record indicators in the landscape that reveal traditional Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander land management practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record indicators in the landscape that reveal traditional Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander land management practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record indicators in the landscape that reveal traditional Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander land management practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Identify cultural value links to cultural landscapes
